ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT( $Permission.C_PERM_8030_Bypass_OwnedByCompany_V_RULE ) && ISPICKVAL(Type, "Field Service") && OR(ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c,"Assist") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c,"FAT / SAT") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c,"Field Application Support") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c,"Hardware") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c,"Installation") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c,"Integration") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c,"Move / Re-Install") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c,"Preventative Maintenance") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c,"Service Call") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c,"Update / Upgrade") ,ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c,"Validation")) && ISBLANK( AssetId )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_017: Please link to correct Asset in "Assets" section of Case
